seoTitle: Use Monday.com for Inventory Management (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Build an inventory system in Monday.com with stock alerts, supplier links, barcode scanning, and a dashboard to prevent stockouts.
intro: Running out of stock unexpectedly or losing track of supplier orders hurts small businesses fast. This guide walks through building an inventory management board in Monday.com, connecting it to sales and purchase orders, and setting up automated low-stock alerts. You'll also see how the mobile barcode scanner fits into day-to-day stock updates.

steps.heading: Create your inventory master board
steps.body: Set up item groups such as In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock, or Product Categories.

steps.heading: Add core inventory columns
steps.body: Use Numbers, Status, People, and Connect Boards columns to track stock quantities, SKU codes, unit costs, and assigned warehouse managers.

steps.heading: Connect to sales and purchase order boards
steps.body: Link your inventory board to a Sales or Purchase Order board so stock counts update automatically as orders come in.

steps.heading: Automate low-stock alerts
steps.body: Set up automations to change an item's status and notify procurement teams via email or Slack once stock falls below a threshold.

steps.heading: Use the mobile barcode scanner
steps.body: Scan, look up, and update inventory counts on the go using the Barcode Column feature in the Monday.com mobile app.

steps.heading: Build an inventory dashboard
steps.body: Design a dashboard with chart and battery widgets to monitor total asset value, turnover rates, and supplier fulfillment timelines.

faq.question: Can I get alerted when stock runs low?
faq.answer: Yes, automations can change an item's status and notify procurement teams via email or Slack when stock falls below a custom threshold.

faq.question: Can I scan barcodes to update stock counts?
faq.answer: Yes, the Barcode Column feature in the Monday.com mobile app lets you scan, look up, and update inventory counts on the go.

faq.question: How does inventory connect to sales orders?
faq.answer: You can link your inventory board relationally to a Sales or Purchase Order board so stock counts update automatically.

faq.question: Can I track total asset value at a glance?
faq.answer: Yes, an inventory dashboard with chart and battery widgets can display total asset value and turnover rates.
